query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.isPremium, u.role,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts pa WHERE pa.userId = u.id) as attempts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts pa WHERE pa.userId = u.id AND pa.isCorrect = 1) as correct_attempts
FROM users u 
WHERE u.name NOT LIKE 'Guest-%'
ORDER BY attempts DESC;
command:

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts pa WHERE pa.userId = u.id) as attempts,

FROM users u

ORDER BY attempts DESC;
